snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Kuch Toh Hai | कुछ तो है | Episode 01 | 07 February 2021
snippet.description:
Priya, an orphan, who becomes an overnight news sensation after surviving a deadly fall from her college building, sets out on a voyage to find the source of her supernatural powers, her mother. However, with danger lurking around at every corner for her, where will Priya's fate take her?
#ColorsTV #KuchTohHai

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KtGMWWGWEwISMugO_764Tgz

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Bani, the adi naagin challenged the laws of nature and loved Veer, the cheel. The result? The birth of Rehaan - a deadly creature with both their qualities. But, what happens when he falls in love with Priya, a fairy? An epic saga unfolds!

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancé Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

localized.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
localized.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancé Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

snippet.title: Mystery Of The Infants | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Many people in a society chase a man. The man then goes inside one of the houses and picks up a baby. When the people get their hands on the man, they start hitting him. Two women identify the baby and Bhavish and Jyoti's daughter. When they go to their house, they are shocked to find both of them dead and the CID team is approached for further investigation. Who killed the couple? Watch this episode to find out.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms/​ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MaddockFilms​
Instagram: https://instagram.com/maddockfilms

#RajkummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #Roohi

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 12 February 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: फेरी प्रिन्स र आशाको झन कडा दोहोरी | Prince Lamshal VS Asha BC | Sarangi Sansar Live Dohori Ep. 197
snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल दोहोरी गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी लोकदोहोरी गायिका आशा बि.सी.  बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी "डोको बुनेर" प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद । 

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल दोहोरी गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी लोकदोहोरी गायिका आशा बि.सी.  बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी "डोको बुनेर" प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद । 

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

Bhajanindia 🔔 Click To Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/Bhajanindia
 Start your day with "Bhajan India" to bring peace to your soul.
 मन की शांति के लिए "भजन इंडिया" यूट्यूब चैनल पर भजन और भक्ति गीत,आरती,चालीसा व मंत्र सुने 🌸 Please subscribe to the channel and press Bell icon for all the updates, we are coming up with many new Bhajans  💗﻿🌸

#SaraswatiMataBhajan #BasantPanchamiSpecial
  #MorningBhajan

 Wings Music presents The 'Bhajan India'. Channel. It is our Sincere commitment to make The Bhajan India an ultimate Devotional channel on Youtube.

You will find here best of the best Devotional music like: Bhajans, Aarti's,  Mantras, Meditation Chants, Jaap, Shlokas, Amritwani and Kirtan's. Shree Krishna Bhajan , Hanuman Bhajan , Ganesh Bhajan ,Ram Bhajan , Laxmi Bhajan , Santoshi Maa , Sherawali Mata , Aarti Sangrah , Morning Mantra ,Shiv Bhajan , Shanidev Bhajan , Vishnu Bhajan , Saibaba Bhajan , Devi maa Bhajan  , Laxmi Aarti , Ganesh Aarti , Om Jai Jagdish Aarti , Shiv Aarti , Hanuman Aarti ,Shani Aarti , Santoshi mata Aarti , Sai Arati ,Bhajan Bhajan , Bhajan Hindi , Bhakti Songs Hindi , Bhakti Gana , Bhakti Song ,Somvar Bhakti , Mangalvar Bhakti , Budhwar Bhakti , Guruvar Bhakti , Shukarwar bhakti ,Shanivar Bhakti , Ravivar Bhakti , Special , Shri Ganesh Bhajan , Hanuman Bhajan , Lord Shiv Bhajan , Sai Bhajan , Shri vishnu Bhajan , Devi Bhajan , Laxmi Bhajan , Santoshi mata Bhajan , Shani Bhajan , Shree Shanidev Bhajan , Shree Ram Bhajan , Suryadev Bhajan , 
Somvar Special Bhajan , Manglvar Special Bhajan ,Budhwar Special Bhajan , Guruvar Special Bhajan , Shukarvar Special Bhajan , Shanivar Special Bhajan , Ravivar Special Bhajan , Morning Bhajan, Bhajan From Films , Many More Bhajan....



Please subscribe to our channel and send your suggestions/Requests for new bhajans, mantra, etc. We will try to fulfill it at the earliest.

Divine quotes & Sayings:

* The spiritual nature of music cannot be defined by religion, culture or genre
* Music and spiritual life go together; one complements the other
* Music is the mediator between the spiritual and the sensual life
* There is nothing in the world so much like prayer as music is

snippet.description:
While Omkar asserts to do the pooja with his wife Mayura, she gets intimidated by Omkar's vigorous behaviour. Tune in to the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Pani Padhero 2 | Kurai Bujhdaina | Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan | New Nepali Song 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Pani Padhero ( Kurai Bujhdaina) by Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan only on Eenakshi Entertainment's official YouTube channel.

Eenakshi Entertainment Presents:- New Nepali Song 2021

|| Pani Padhero 2 Kurai Bujhdaina कुरै बुझ्दैन (पानी पँधेरो-2) || 

#BhimBista #EleenaChauhan #EenakshiEntertainment #NewNepaliSong
------------------------------------------

♪ Singer:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

♪ Music:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Lyrics:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Arrange:-
Jeevan Badu

♪ Mix/Master:-
Shyamshwet Rasaily

♪ Studio:- 
Big Parivesh

♪ Flute:- 
Ratna Flute

♪ Guitar/Mendolin:- 
Sanjib Baraily

------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:-

🎬 Artists:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

🎬 Cameraman:- 
Prakash Khadka

🎬 MUA:- 
Mahi Singh

🎬 Edit/Color:-
Dinson Shah

🎬 Technical Adviser:-
Rajendra Aryal

🎬 Publicity Designer:- 
Dinson Shah

कुरै बुझ्दैन Lyrics:- 
तिम्रे फुटो छातिमा टाँस्या छु
तिमी साथमा छौ र पो हाँस्या छु
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-1
एउटा कुरा भन्छु ल आज म
तिमी नै छौ मुटुको माझमा
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निद्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-2
लाली गुराँस फुल फुल्यो बनैमा
तिमी फुल्यौ फक्रक्कै मनैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-2
मुना मदन पढेको कथामा
तिमी र म जिबनभर साथमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-3
तिम्लाई सम्झि टोलाउँछु छिनछिनै
झनझन माया बड्दै छ दिनदिनै कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

G-3
जोडी ढुकुर जैले नि साथैमा
तिम्रै नाऊँको मेहेन्दी हातैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

B-4
मनको कुरो मनैमा सिमित
कैले हामी हुने खै तिमी म कुरेै बुझ्दैन

G-4
घामले पोल्छ शितलु छायाँ छ
मुटुभरि  उसैको माया छ कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-5
भन्न खोज्छु भन्नलाइ डराऊँछु
कति धेरै उस्लाई मन पराऊँछु कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि...

G-5
आखै फुटोस संसारेै हेर्दिन
तिम्ले छोडे सास नै फेर्दिन कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि....

snippet.description:
I heard there’s a special place where all magical beings roam free!
Wouldn’t you die to meet a real live unicorn?!

snippet.title: चॉकलेट के शौक़ीन चुनौती #2 Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
मम्म चॉकलेट, मेरी पसंदीदा, इतनी स्वादिष्ट! यदि तुम भूल गयी हो तो ,तुम अकेली  नहीं हो , यह मेरे लिए भी है! ओह सच में? इसे लो! आह्ह, क्या ???? आप चॉकलेट सही चाहते थे? तुम बस सूसी का इंतजार करो, मैं तुम्हें वापस लाऊंगा! आइए देखें कि आप इस चॉकलेट चैलेंज में किस तरह से उचित हैं, मैंने इसकी व्यवस्था की है!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: Kuch Toh Hai | कुछ तो है | Episode 02 | 13 February 2021
snippet.description:
Rehan stumbles across Priya and is bewitched by her beauty. However, he senses danger when a speeding car approaches her. Subsequently, he uses his power and stops her from meeting with a dangerous accident. Will Priya learn the truth about her life saviour?
#ColorsTV #KuchTohHai

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KtGMWWGWEwISMugO_764Tgz

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Bani, the adi naagin challenged the laws of nature and loved Veer, the cheel. The result? The birth of Rehaan - a deadly creature with both their qualities. But, what happens when he falls in love with Priya, a fairy? An epic saga unfolds!

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: 2021Ajith Kumar Hindi Dubbed Blockbuster Action Movie Full HD 1080p | Meera Jasmine,Adithya Menon
snippet.description:
Movie: Anjaneya 
Starring: Ajith Kumar, Meera Jasmine, Raghuvaran, Jaya Prakash Reddy, Adithya Menon, Ramesh Khanna, Manivannan, Girish Karnad, Mansoor Ali Khan, Seetha
Director: N. Maharajan
Producer: S. S. Chakravarthy
 




Ajith, having been selected as an IPS officer awaits his posting as an Assistant Commissioner of Police. He romances with Meera Jasmine, who also falls in love with him. But his inability to remain silent in the face of injustice makes him beat up ÔFefsiÕ Vijayan, a local rowdy and this puts his posting in jeopardy. He overcomes it to become the AC and stands up to Jaiprakash Reddy, who seems to have both the police and the politicians in his pocket. How he succeeds amidst all obstacles in life is the rest of the movie.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-686 || Jan-19-2021 || Media Hub|| Nepali Comedy
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta

snippet.description:

Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories. 

Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. Presenting you the latest updates and daily dose of entertainment in the form of star cast interviews, gossips, updates of reality shows, behind the scenes, twist in serials. Join the non stop entertainment with Saas Bahu aur Saazish for all the juicy news.

snippet.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
snippet.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961 
ताराकान्त बि. क. Tarakanta BK  9847629512  
याे नम्बरमा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नहुनेछ । यदि याे भिडियाे मन पर्याे भने एक एक सेयर गरेर संसारभर पुर्याईदिन सहयाेग गर्नुहाेला धन्याबाद ।

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

localized.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
localized.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961 
ताराकान्त बि. क. Tarakanta BK  9847629512  
याे नम्बरमा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नहुनेछ । यदि याे भिडियाे मन पर्याे भने एक एक सेयर गरेर संसारभर पुर्याईदिन सहयाेग गर्नुहाेला धन्याबाद ।

snippet.title: Din Gin Gin 'दिन गिन गिन' New Song 2021 by Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi || Paul Shah & Garima Sharma
snippet.description:
"Din Gin Gin" A typical Nepali Cultural Tharu song. This song tries to show Tharu art and culture .The singers of this song Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi are very knowledgeable about Tharu art and culture. Featuring With Paul Shah well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film industry and Garima Sharma also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese Music industry. This song have been filmed in various beautiful places of the Tarai in Tharu Communities. The song is directed by Bikram Chauhan & Cinematographed by Arjun Tiwari.

snippet.description:
@T-Series 
#Akahykumarmovies #Fullmovies #hindimovies

SUBSCRIBER'S REQUEST YOU TO WATCH OUR CHANNEL-PLEASE DO CLICK ON THE ADVERTISEMENTS SO WE CAN MAKE MORE INTRERSTING VIDEOS FOR YOU & ENTERTAIN YOU MORE.
ALSO DO SUBSCRIBE TO OUR CHANNEL.
Bollywood is the name given to the Mumbai-based Hindi-language film industry in India. When combined with other Indian film industries (Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Malayalam, Kannada), it is considered to be the largest in the world in terms of number of films produced, and maybe also the number of tickets sold. The term Bollywood was created by conflating Bombay (the city now called Mumbai) and Hollywood (the famous center of the United States film industry).
Bollywood films are usually musicals. Few movies are made without at least one song-and-dance number. Indian audiences expect full value for their money; they want songs and dances, love interest, comedy and dare-devil thrills, all mixed up in a three hour long extravaganza with intermission. Such movies are called masala movies, after the spice mixture masala. Like masala, these movies have everything. Aamir Khan, Abhay Deol, Abhishek Bachchan, Akshay Kumar, Anil Kapoor, Amitabh Bachchan, Bobby Deol, Dev Anand, 
Dilip Kumar, Emraan Hashmi, Farhan Akhtar, Govinda, Hrithik Roshan, Himesh Reshammiya, Imran Khan, Irrfan Khan, John Abraham, Johnny Lever, Kamal Haasan, Karan Johar, Kishore Kumar, Manoj Kumar, Naseeruddin Shah, Nana Patekar, Pankaj Kapoor, Prabhu Deva Sundaram, Raj Kapoor, Rajesh Khanna, Salman Khan, Sanjay Dutt, Shahid Kapoor, Shahrukh Khan, Sunny Deol,Priyanka Chopra, Rani Mukherji, Katrina Kaif, Parineeti chopra, sonakshi sinha, Aishwarya Rai, Amrita Rao, Ayesha Takia, Bipasha Basu , Celina Jetley,  Deepika Padukone, Diana Hayden,Diya Mirza, Geeta Basra, Gul Panag,  Juhi Chawla, Kajol Mukherjee , Kangana Ranaut, Kareena Kapoor , Karisma Kapoor , Lisa Ray, Madhuri Dixitm,  Mugdha Godse, neetu Chandra, Preity Zinta , Raveena Tandon, Samira Reddy,  Sherlyn Chopra, Shriya Saran,Sonam Kapoor , Tabu, Vidya Balan,  Yana Gupta

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 298 - Full Episode - 11th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 298: Kids Are Scared With Mahabali
---------------------------------------
Kids are scared with Mahabali. everyone has hidden in the library but Vivan is missing. Mahabali is looking for a secret map and he finds the kids, Sir tries to stop Mahabali but Mahabali throws him away. watch the full episode on SonyLiv.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: LADY COBRA | New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

snippet.title: नोट में गाँधी जी का फोटो कहाँ से आया? Gandhi Ji's Image on Rupee - Where it Came From? - TEF Ep 122
snippet.description:
Indian currency consists of Gandhiji's image. Do you know when it was taken? Is it an artwork or an actual image? Do you know airplanes often fly at odd even altitudes? hi.title: रुकें प्रस्ताव प्रयोग ASMR - भूमिगत बड़ी मछली खाने ईल मछली जाल आदिम प्रयोग खाना पकाने कोयल
hi.description:
हमारे देश में ईल मछली बहुत आम मछली है लेकिन इन्हें पकड़ना बहुत कठिन है। स्टॉप मोशन ASMR अंडरग्राउंड बड़ी मछली खाने वाली ट्रिम आदिम "प्रयोग" कोयल द्वारा खाना बनाना। आपको उन्हें पकड़ने के लिए मजबूत और सख्त होने की जरूरत है। लेकिन आज हम उन्हें पकड़ने के लिए व्यस्त का उल्लेख कर रहे हैं। सबसे पहले हमने एक ईल मछली का छेद पाया और गहरी मिट्टी के अंदर खुदाई शुरू की। यह आश्चर्य की बात थी कि मछली में बिल्कुल था।
हमारे वीडियो को देखने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपसे आशा है।
▬▬▬▬▬
0:00 डीप मड के नीचे से पीले राक्षस मछली पकड़ना
3:25 मुकाबांग ऑक्टोपस परागण सर्वश्रेष्ठ मत्स्य पालन
5:09 ईल्स फिश ट्रैप एक्सपेरिमेंट कुकिंग!
7:08 अविश्वसनीय कैटफ़िश, मछली खाना पकाना
▬▬▬▬▬
👉 चेतावनी: यह वास्तविक नहीं है, इसे मत खाओ!
राक्षस कीड़े से मुंगबंग बीबीक्यू चिकन 70m बार देखे गए: https://youtu.be/o-QQr7sGEgg
► ► स्टॉप मोशन ASMR - स्वादिष्ट सांप: https://youtu.be/nIG3iJbkEfo
► out प्रयोग ASMR: https://youtu.be/E_xfTruZRb4
अधिक वीडियो के लिए SUBSCRIBE करें: https:// कोयल https://bit.ly/3fBmlyA

सभी प्रकरण स्टॉप मोशन एनीमेशन तकनीक के उपयोग के तहत बनाए गए हैं और बीस्टडियो कं, लिमिटेड के स्वामित्व में हैं। फिर से न करें। शब्द विचार, बहुत धन्यवाद @Stop Motion कुकिंग

snippet.title: Gharko jhyalaima | Chatra Shahi, Menuka Pariyar, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata | New Dohori Song 2021
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment presents a typical and cultural new lok dohori song "gharko Jhyalaima" 2077/2021. The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years. 
Menuka Pariyar is also a very skilled and talented singer. Most of the songs she sang by are also very popular and most viewed in nepal.
Featuring artists on this song are Jibesh Singh Gurung, Lomash Sharma, Alina Rayamajhi, Samiksha Pokhrel & Punya Gautam. Jibesh Singh Gurung is a popular and talented actor, director, and writer at Colleges Nepal comedy series. Alina Rayamajhi & Samiksha Pokhrel are rising and talented actresses in Nepalese film & music Industry. And Lomash Sharma, a handsome, talented and most skilled rising star in nepali folk music industry.
Special Appearance Punya Gautam, who has been active in politics since childhood, aims to serve the country and the people selflessly by engaging in politics all of his life.

►©►S3K Entertainment Pvt. Ltd 2021. All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || श्री स्वस्थानी विशेष || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-688 || Feb-02-2021 || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

Official Teaser: https://youtu.be/3iH0YehfMB0

Follow Netflix India on:
Website: https://www.netflix.com/
YouTube: http://bit.ly/NetflixIndiaYT

The story is based on the epic tale of Mahabharata and focuses on Duryodhana's life as a brave warrior, who succumbs to injustice within the family and meets an unexpected tragic end. snippet.title: Saraswati Vandana by Anuradha Paudwal & Kavita Paudwal | Basant Panchami Saraswati Puja Song
snippet.description:
सरस्वती वन्दना | Saraswati Vandana | Saraswati Puja | Basant Panchami 2021
सरस्वती या कुन्देन्दु देवी सरस्वती को समर्पित बहुत प्रसिद्ध स्तुति है जो सरस्वती स्तोत्रम का एक अंश है। इस सरस्वती स्तुति का पाठ वसन्त पञ्चमी के पावन दिन पर सरस्वती पूजा के दौरान किया जाता है।
या कुन्देन्दुतुषारहारधवला या शुभ्रवस्त्रावृता।
या वीणावरदण्डमण्डितकरा या श्वेतपद्मासना॥
या ब्रह्माच्युत शंकरप्रभृतिभिर्देवैः सदा वन्दिता।
सा मां पातु सरस्वती भगवती निःशेषजाड्यापहा॥१॥

Ya Kundendu Tusharahara Dhavala Ya Shubhra Vastravrita
Ya Veena Varadanda Manditakara Ya Shveta Padmasana
Ya Brahmachyuta Shankara Prabhritibhir Devaih Sada Pujita
Sa Mam Pattu Saravatee Bhagavatee Nihshesha Jadyapaha॥1॥

Singer: Anuradha Paudwal & Kavita Paudwal
Music Director: Sanjayraj Gaurinandan (SRG)
Lyrics: Traditional 

#सरस्वतीवन्दना #saraswativandana #saraswatipuja #basantpanchami2021 #याकुन्देन्दु #yakundendu
#saraswatibhajan #saraswatiaarti #saraswatimantra #bhaktisongs #shemaroobhakti

https://shemaroo.com/ShemarooBhakti/

snippet.title: District 13 IN HINDI | Hollywood Hindi Dubbed FULL ACTION Movie | Cyril Raffaelli
snippet.description:
Check our new Hollywood TAMIL Channel for Full Movies Dubbed in Tamil - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Nt97MD1kNEobv25LqGIqA

- Subscribe to watch latest #HollywoodMovies Dubbed in Hindi - http://bit.ly/sub-hollywoodhindi 

#District13 : Ultimatum is a 2004 French #ActionFilm directed by Pierre Morel starring #DavidBelle, #CyrilRaffaelli And Dany Verrisimo. 

The film is notable for its depiction of parkour in a number of stunt sequences that were completed without the use of wires or computer generated effects. Because of this, some film critics have drawn comparisons to the popular Thai film Ong-Bak.

Synopsis: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

Do watch this NEW RELEASED HOLLYWOOD HINDI ACTION MOVIE NOW !!

****Starring : - David Belle, Cyril Raffaelli, Dany Verrisimo, Bibi Naceri And Tony D'Amario.
